mapper.sql: from sys_school s join sys_dict_item d on d.id = s.category_dict_item_id left join sys_school_tag_rel rel on rel.school_id = s.id left join sys_school_tag t on t.id = rel.tag_id where 1 = 1
mapper.select:
select count(*) from sys_school s join sys_dict_item d on d.id = s.category_dict_item_id where 1 = 1
and (s.school_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or s.school_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or d.dict_label like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

select s.id, s.school_code, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label as category_label, group_concat(distinct t.tag_name order by t.tag_name separator '、') as tag_summary
group by s.id, s.school_code, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label order by s.school_name
select s.id, s.school_code, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label as category_label from sys_school s join sys_dict_item d on d.id = s.category_dict_item_id order by s.school_name

select s.id, s.school_code, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label as category_label, group_concat(distinct t.tag_name order by t.tag_name separator '、') as tag_summary
and s.id = #{id} group by s.id, s.school_code, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label limit 1

select s.id, s.school_code, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label as category_label, group_concat(distinct t.tag_name order by t.tag_name separator '、') as tag_summary
and s.school_code = #{schoolCode} group by s.id, s.school_code, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label limit 1

select s.id, s.school_code, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label as category_label, group_concat(distinct t.tag_name order by t.tag_name separator '、') as tag_summary
and s.school_name = #{schoolName} group by s.id, s.school_code, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label limit 1
select tag_id from sys_school_tag_rel where school_id = #{schoolId} order by id
mapper.insert: insert into sys_school (school_code, school_name, category_dict_item_id) values (#{schoolCode}, #{schoolName}, #{categoryDictItemId})
mapper.select: select count(*) from youth_info where school_code = #{schoolCode} and deleted = 0

select s.id, s.school_code, s.school_name, s.category_dict_item_id, d.dict_label as category_label, null as tag_summary from sys_school s join sys_dict_item d on d.id = s.category_dict_item_id where 1 = 1 and s.school_code in
#{code}
